programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph a doctor keeps dominating peoples lives He frees a robber Rune from getting hanged; and forces his charge on him too as compensation Things change when Elizabeth enters Josephs life

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble wants to expose a defect in the bloodline of a kennel owners dog but the son and daughter-in-law threaten to stop him

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike attempts to rescue a movie starlet trapped underwater aboard a ship which is flooded after a special effects dynamite blast

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: The US Coast Guard recruits Mike to search for a missing missile on the ocean floor

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Every series deserves at least one good spooky episode and this is it for 12oH The Lorelei is a bomber that returns from a mission and lands intact but with its entire crew dead Gen Savage assigns the plane to his new 2nd-in-command Col Royce who hes supposed to evaluate for assignment as a group commander Royce is a highly-experienced decorated and well-liked pilot with one apparent flaw; hes decidedly superstitious and hes just been handed command of a Flying Dutchman that seems to have a mind of its own The Twilight Zone visits the 918th

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period Natalie questions Victoria and Abigall and Naomi argue Joshua appears in front of Abigail in Victorias room

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period Josette wakes up in Jeremiahs arms but later she regrets marrying Jeremiah Joshua tells Andre and Barnabas that Abigail has engaged the Rev Trask to hunt for the witch

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time periodBarnabas challenges Jeremiah to a duel which Josette and Angelique cannot prevent

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period While Jeremiah lays dying witchhunter Reverand Trask enters Collinwood He ties Victoria to a tree and tries to exorcise her

programme.title: Lights of Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: In this musical western Marjorie Brooks Dale Evans is the owner and operator of a rodeo thats an antiquated touring company on its last legs Her business rival Frank Madden Richard Powers offers to combine their operations if the lovely Marjorie will be his bride Though she initially rebuffs his proposal a canceled booking tips the scales and forces Marjorie to accept But rodeo rider Roy Rogers Roy Rogers suspects Frank is behind Marjories troubles and sets out to investigate

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A cop learns that an illustrator of Tales from the Crypt might have the power to make his monstrous creations come to life due to his shrewish wife

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Enoch the two-faced man an attraction at a sideshow falls in love with a 4000 year old mummy eventually leading up to the conception of their bastard child The Crypt Keeper

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The various unlucky owners of a strange bag of cocaine are followed over the course of a night

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Successful romance novelist Claudia returns to her small hometown of Bolton to attend her high school reunion Claudia gets involved in a steamy affair with handsome young resident stud Lance However trouble materializes in the form of jealous and sinister ex-boyfriend turned local sheriff Lee

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is kidnapped by a corrupt Southern politician who is dying of cancer and wants Eric to cure him and make him immortal by turning him into a werewolf

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is stranded by a thunderstorm in an isolated log lodge with six other people who are being killed off one by one

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When an Ambassador is the prime suspect in a murder investigation Nick ignores his orders and wrongly accuses the powerful politician

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A devious antiques dealer uses a magic lantern to travel back to the Civil War so he can steal artifacts from dead soldiers

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter takes a temporary desk job writing training manuals and considers making it permanent when he sees the platoon does fine without him; so Gomer messes things up to bring the Sergeant back

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Russian agent who looks and dresses exactly like Gilligan holds Gilligan captive and questions the castaways about their activities However nobody believes Gilligans story and they accuse him of causing all the mischief

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan reels in a crate of vegetable seeds from the lagoon but fails to notice the warning on the crate that the seeds are radioactive

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa trades a date with Flora for a hound dog

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The Farmers Association is having its fall dance and Grandpa doesnt want to take Flora MacMichael until Little Luke tells him about the box supper that Flora is bringing

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is investigating a madman who is blowing up high-rise buildings though CONTROL is not sure how he is doing it

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Agent 86 has amnesia after he hears about a KAOS plot

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When High Ball Trucking corners the regional supply on diesel and tries to squeeze out the independent carriers BJ taps an alternative fuel source guaranteed to keep him ahead of Hammer and a pesky revenuer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While Hogan detains a German general during an Allied offensive a Gestapo officer looks into Stalag 13s perfect escape record

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans latest underground contacts are secretly German spies

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys have planned some entertainment for the Base Personnel but Binghamton puts a stop to it and orders McHale and his Crew to ferry him to a Staff Meeting so that he can keep an eye on them But after the 73 is put out of commission by a Japanese plane Binghamton if forced to do some entertaining of his own during a mission to obtain some fuel on a Japanese-held island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While trying to impress a pretty Nurse Parker receives several serious blows to his morale and humiliated he puts in for a transfer Then complications arise when McHale The Crew and the Nurse work up a plan to try to help him to regain his self-esteem and change his mind

programme.title: Gomer 230
programme.desc: Gomer 230

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Attack Force Nam
programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An Irish guide finds the possible burial location of Mael a Taelon that came to Earth 2000 years ago It is crucial for the Taelons to find his research material

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne learns that a friend of hers has disappeared from his college campus Meanwhile the aliens are on campus in search of a bio-weapon

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two of Tressas friends are trapped in an invisible stealth shield developed by Dr Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alien glyphs appear on all of Alphas screens Koenig sends an Eagle to investigate The Eagle is lost and the pilot is taken over by a huge alien Space Brain using him as a channel to make the Alphans do its bidding Koenig has to destroy it

programme.title: Android
programme.desc: A strange doctor secretly experiments with androids on his space station His assistant is Max a curious android who wants to see the world and meet a girl Criminals hide on their station and soon violence erupts

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne brings a bank robber into town to his old friend Sam A popular ranchers son is accidentally killed by Sam when a drunken mob tries to hang him Its up to Cheyenne to bring to justice the guilty party and free his friend

programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone and Keller suspect there is more to a string of college campus shootings than meets the eye

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: When the IMFs original scheme to free an elderly cardinal from an inescapable prison in a fictional Eastern European country goes awry the team must concoct a new plan to get him out of solitary confinement

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: An immigrant cigar makers son is accosted by neighborhood bullies and calls the police to put a stop to the harassment The only witness to the incident is Dr Kimble whose face seems oddly familiar to the officers

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into a town looking for a job He runs into a hired killer he knows who tries to kill him but is shot by the local sheriff Once he learns who the man was the sheriff hires Cheyenne to work undercover to find who hired him

programme.title: Embryo
programme.desc: A twisted scientist performs an experiment on a human foetus to accelerate growth from a foetus into an adult in just a few days The experiment results in a beautiful 22-year-old woman who falls in love with her creator

programme.title: Wavelength
programme.desc: Two young lovers learn that a small group of child-like space aliens are marooned on Earth and are being held prisoner at a top secret military facility The couple then decide to liberate the extraterrestrial castaways and help them make a rendezvous with a rescue ship sent from the alien home planet

programme.title: Digital Man
programme.desc: An out-of-control robot is inadvertently set loose in a small community and a crack squad of soldiers are sent to hunt it down Gradually the members of the squad begin to suspect that some of them are robots

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.title: Battletruck
programme.desc: Post World War III futuristic tale of collapsed governments bankrupt countries heralding a new lawless age

programme.desc: Bad luck turns to tragedy for an ex-biker Dennis Hopper his drug-addict wife Sharon Farrell and their teenage daughter Linda Manz

programme.desc: Epic Fishing FAIL: He Could Have KILLED Someone! Mullet Run Inshore Saltwater Fishing for Snook in Stuart, Florida MILES FROM CIVILIZATION! Fishing DEEP Into F"

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: An unconquered planet in the midst of Monster Minds intrigues the Lightning League and they go to investigate Upon crash landing they discover the energy of the Pride and the vehicles and their own energy is being drained

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss offers a huge reward to pirates and cut-throats if they will deliver Jayce to him A pirate scratches Herc with his special ring which causes Herc to become evil and start plotting against Jayce Jayce must take the Pride to Planet Hippo

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: After Matt Trakkers sailing ship catches fire unexpectedly MASK decides to investigate a soon to be opened amusement park on a Greek island

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Giant caterpillars appear in the Central American Jungle By clearing a path they reveal a map to the temple of an ancient Malacca civilization

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain sets a trap by showing the N team she is defeated and also opens up a warp zone with Kevins neighborhood shown on the other side Foolishly Kevin goes through and the members of his team are captured and banished to the Black Hole Warp Zone Kevin realizes hes actually on Metroid Then he succeeds into getting back to the Palace and rescuing the N team

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: On his birthday Mega Man really wishes to become human So he is ready to pass the Three Challenges to accomplish humanity

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to find the location of MADs school for agents

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to retrieve a group of Malaysian explorers who are now MADs prisoners

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 turns evil when hes tricked into changing into a fake power suit but Cy-Kills plot backfires when hes deposed by the newly nasty Guardian
